defaults.ptx_feature: PTX ISA 8.7 minimum; CUDA 13.3 emits PTX 9.3

stages.detail: libNVVM emitted all 25 typed forms in 6512-byte PTX (SHA-256 f3ae18918d3e7f9e0bec9c61e2e1311480fba0c25b761c8e6029e971089af51f) and 7528-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 0088b1e372a1e11616976865a952786ee045fd9dc761b1944a2823795b5748d3). For a 1310-byte duplicate-call fixture (SHA-256 df619d51a8b6e43fbe33f341608739f534798ba10daaac71e62182c06e3d7556), it merged two identical calls into one instruction in 1297-byte PTX (SHA-256 262c703198f1ee28ab23f8440f0e19de21d6e74ddf6c2d5c35f371a19cd77d9a) and emitted 2412-byte LTOIR (SHA-256 6a2ef1e2cbb89c86b9aed5d32109fab85b3bf7ee76d7e7ebcc56c7d756f3ff84). The selected convergent inline route retained both calls.
